entry_rule: BUY debit call spread near mid on pullback day (trend up).
exit_rule: TP: sell at 50% max profit (spread≈3.29); SL: sell if spread≤0.79 OR close<EMA21 (≈256.55); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.

entry_rule: SELL credit call spread near mid on pullup day (trend down).
exit_rule: TP: buy back at 50% max profit (spread≈0.80); SL: buy back if spread≥3.20 OR close>EMA21 (≈143.01); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.
